sessions.name: Scatter — activity vs hour
sessions.description: A simple scatterplot of a noisy ~24 h rhythmic signal against hours since start (7 days, hourly).

sessions.name: Histogram — distribution
sessions.description: Histogram of 500 samples drawn from a normal distribution (mean 100, sd 15).

sessions.name: Boxplot — activity by day
sessions.description: Boxplot of daily activity values grouped by day index (7 days × 24 hourly points).

sessions.name: Actogram — multi-day activity
sessions.description: Actogram of a noisy ~24 h rhythm over 7 days (hourly samples).

sessions.name: Periodogram — period detection
sessions.description: Lomb–Scargle periodogram of a ~24 h rhythm (7 days, hourly).

sessions.name: Correlogram — autocorrelation
sessions.description: Autocorrelogram of a ~24 h rhythm (7 days, hourly).

sessions.name: FFT — frequency spectrum
sessions.description: Fourier spectrum of a 12 h + 24 h composite rhythm (8 days, hourly).

sessions.name: Table — raw columns
sessions.description: A tableplot listing an hour index alongside two derived signals.
